mapper.select: SELECT s.SUBJ_ID AS subjId, s.SUBJ_NM AS subjNm, ROUND(AVG(a.SCORE / q.ALLOC_SCR) * 100, 0) AS avgScoreRate FROM ANSWER_SUBMIT a JOIN QUESTION_LIST q ON a.QSTN_SN = q.QSTN_SN JOIN SUBJECT s ON q.SUBJ_ID = s.SUBJ_ID JOIN CLASSROOM_MEMBER cm ON a.STD_USER_ID = cm.USER_ID AND cm.CLASS_SN = #{classSn} WHERE a.SCORE IS NOT NULL AND q.QSTN_TYPE_CD = 'MULTIPLE_CHOICE' GROUP BY s.SUBJ_ID, s.SUBJ_NM HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 ORDER BY avgScoreRate ASC
